title: Normalize mixed-style PermissionService into one philosophy
prompt: Refactor `MyApp.PermissionService` from test_fixtures/mixed_style_module.ex. The module mixes four styles: `case` in body, multi-clause function heads, body `if` checks, and another `case`. Normalize to ONE consistent style — multi-clause function heads pattern-matching on the struct shape directly. Preserve all original semantics. Output a complete `defmodule MyApp.PermissionService do ... end`.
tier_rationale: Requires recognizing four distinct styles and unifying them. Sonnet often leaves one branch untouched.
